summary:
SPIRITUAL REFRESHING AND THE REFINING PROCESS: Brandon recounts a vision where Jesus appeared to him, explaining that believers do not remain in the valley but move from glory to glory as they mature. Brandon shares a story of a man who visited heaven and learned that earthly pain and trials are essential for spiritual growth, emphasizing that God does not inflict sickness but uses life's challenges to mold His followers. Brandon details the importance of putting Jesus first in marriage and finances, noting how he learned to tithe under Pastor Mark and how God used Diana's discernment and Holy Ghost-inspired business ideas to financially sustain their family.

PROPHETIC WARNINGS FOR AMERICA AND GLOBAL POLITICS: Brandon issues urgent warnings for 2026, describing it as a high-alert year with potential terrorist attacks and a Red Dawn scenario. Brandon asserts that America remains a sheep nation rooted in the foundational prayers of the Pilgrims at Plymouth Rock and George Washington's battlefield intercessions. Brandon prophesies regarding political figures, praying that JD Vance does not become a Judas to Donald Trump and warning of deceptive spiritual influences surrounding the Prince of Saudi Arabia, whom Brandon explicitly identifies as the Antichrist. Brandon foresees major political upheavals in Mexico and Venezuela, the negotiation of a third temple in Israel, and severe storms or tsunamis striking Miami and New York.

HISTORICAL VISIONS AND END-TIME REVELATIONS: Brandon describes panoramic visions of human history, observing Noah building the ark, Adam interacting with a dinosaur in Eden, and the construction of the Great Wall of China and the Egyptian pyramids by massive men. Brandon recalls witnessing the destruction of the lost city of Atlantis and details Eve's physical appearance, noting her olive skin and uniquely colored eyes. Brandon warns that the current dispensation of grace is ending, urging listeners to prepare for the imminent return of Jesus and the seven-year tribulation, while asserting his belief that faithful Christians will escape God's wrath.

CHURCH LUKEWARMNESS AND BIBLICAL AUTHORITY: Brandon strongly condemns lukewarm Christianity and pastors who dilute the gospel to maintain church attendance numbers. Brandon criticizes the acceptance of sinful lifestyles, specifically mentioning strip clubs, homosexuality, and gender transitions within the church, and recounts an incident where a secular rock song was played during a worship service. Brandon emphasizes the biblical principle that words carry the power of life and death, warning that divine judgment, specifically an amplification of 1 Corinthians 5:5, is coming upon disobedient spiritual leaders who fail to preach the truth of repentance.

DIVINE ENCOUNTERS AND APOCALYPTIC JUDGMENTS: Brandon details encounters with the Holy Spirit, describing the Spirit as a massive, barrel-chested figure made of green-tinted blue fire. Brandon recounts Diana's near-death experience during childbirth, characterizing her transition state as an overwhelming sense of peace. Brandon then shares an extensive apocalyptic vision where Jesus marches through European villages in the Swiss Alps and Germany to gather souls, while simultaneous global judgments unfold. Brandon visualizes transparent, giant angels blowing deafening horns, wealthy elites like Mark Zuckerberg attempting to hide in underground bunkers, massive ocean die-offs resulting in widespread starvation, and devastating volcanic activity. Brandon concludes the prayer session by directly interceding against a specific planned abortion, commanding spiritual forces to release the mother's mind.
rawData: [November 18, 2025]-[The Lord showed us in prayer the Great and terrible day]-[https://youtu.be/3-UAs7VAr4Y]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. It's Diana and Brandon, and we're excited to be here. We have some things in our heart, but I don't have a lot; I'm just going to pray with you all. I know we came on a little bit later than normal. I try to come on by then, but as you're driving around like we were today, we could feel the presence. I told Diana, 'Don't you just feel the presence of the Lord so strongly?' And she could, too. It was right after we watched Billy Burke last night; the presence of the Lord was tangible when he was in Orlando. Truly, I have never experienced through a phone or a device watching and feeling the presence of the Lord fill your car or your house like that. It lingered all night and all day. As I was seeking Him and as I went to the prayer group last night, I had an open-eyed vision of Jesus. He came, and I didn't know that Diana had been praying for me that afternoon. After I told her what happened, she started crying and said, 'Brandon, I was interceding for you, just asking God to give you a refreshing. I know you pour out so much and you're tired a lot.' She said, 'I was in my own private prayer time this morning, and I was praying for you. I asked the Lord to become real to Braden even more, help him, and give him strength.' When I went to prayer that night—which was Sunday night, I guess—my life just runs together. Last night, He spoke to me, and I said, 'Lord, I miss You.' All of a sudden, I just closed my eyes, and Jesus appeared before me in a vision, like He does whenever I'm on here. He started talking to me about some things that were very private, encouraging me just like she was asking. Because of all the things that I had delivered this last week, it was hard. I said, 'Lord, I need refreshing. Is everything okay? Are we cool right now?' And He said, 'Well, why wouldn't it be?' I said, 'Well, I've had a rough week.' And He said, 'Brandon, you just need to be refreshed. You're dry. You're thirsty.' You know, ladies and gentlemen, when you are so used to going through the valley of life, He said, 'Once you pass a certain test—Jesus said this to me yesterday—once you pass a certain test in school, you don't keep going there. You graduate.' As you are in the body of Christ, as you are on the potter's wheel and as you go from glory to glory, you don't camp in the valley. You don't camp in what you're going through for the refining fire. The refining fire is for a season, and once you pass the test, you don't have to take it again. He said, 'Brandon, you went through those things and you passed those tests, but you're so used to camping around what you had been through in the past.' From working at my grandmother's, working at the church, and having Megan, you build a wall of defense where you're always looking for the next blow. You feel that victim mentality where you walk through life feeling like you're always going through something because you're growing from glory to glory. But those tests were for that season of life. The Lord says as you grow and mature, those things become the tests that you passed. Just like in fifth, sixth, or seventh grade, you don't go back and repeat those. You just take what you learned and add to it. You keep going until you graduate. You always remember what you learned, but you never have to take the test that you took to get to the next level. You go from glory to glory. That's what He was showing me: that season is done, and He is taking me somewhere new. There are seasons of blessing and refreshing in every believer's life. It's not always about the valley. We go through hard times in our Christian walk, and that's what makes us stronger. Diana found this man who had died and went to heaven. In his testimony, he came back and said his mother told him in heaven, 'Don't forget what pain feels like, because you won't have any of it up here.' Don't take it for granted. Pain causes you to grow; trials cause you to grow. There are no trials up there to spur you to grow. The hard times are what refines you. A lot of times, when your flesh is screaming the loudest is when God has His hand on that potter's wheel and He's pushing down. Does God cause the pain? No. I want to tell you God is a rewarder of those who diligently seek Him. He is a blesser, not a curser. But because we live in a fallen world, hard times come. I always stay on God's side; God does not put sickness on people to teach them a lesson. I don't believe that. There's no sickness in heaven, so how can He give it to you? When you get to heaven, He doesn't have any sickness there, and He and the devil aren't buddies joining up to inflict His kids. What kind of father would do that? The Bible says, 'If you, being evil, give good gifts to your children, how much more does your heavenly Father give good gifts to those that love Him?' He's not giving snakes or sickness to teach you something. Because we live in a fallen world and go through life, it molds us and you grow—and also because of our own dumb decisions. But regarding the valley, the man said, 'Don't forget the way pain feels because you won't feel any in heaven.' The trial makes you grow. She said, 'And don't forget what touch feels like in this way, because it's different in heaven.' When he went to heaven—and I know he had an authentic encounter, this man wept the whole time—the glory of the Lord was present. He was a druggie and had a massive heart attack, and when he went up there, he had all this about the Father and all the inadequacies that we feel because God is so perfect. But every single thing he said was things that Jesus had said to me. Every single thing, not every single thing, but a lot of them. I don't, because that's exaggeration. Some of the things he said the Lord said to him were what the Lord said to me privately in the visitations I've had with him, and I thought, he said that to him too? Isn't that amazing that he'll help you through it? That you can't mess your life up? The footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. Brandon, he said that to me. The footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. No matter how hard you try, you couldn't mess your life up if you're seeking me and you're looking towards my face. He said, You can't mess your life up because I'll turn what the devil meant for bad and turn it around for good for you, Brandon, if you're always looking for me. No matter how bad you mess your life up, how bad you might think you've messed your life up, if you're seeking the Lord, he'll turn it on a dime. It's about putting Jesus first. We must learn to put Jesus first. He is everything. If you put him first in your marriage, if you put him first with your children, if you put him first in your finances—that's why the Bible says, you know, a lot of people get all upset when you tell them about tithing and giving, but we were forced to learn how to tithe. Our church forced us to tithe. Because we were on staff, if we didn't tithe, they'd fire you. And so I knew whenever you're forced to learn how to tithe, it then becomes habit because we worked there for so many years. So people say, Oh, I don't believe in tithing. Oh, I believe with all my heart. I believe in tithing more than—I'm telling you, I have got the revelation of tithing, not because of something that I wanted, but because I was forced to. And I thank God for Mark all the time. Pastor Mark, he taught us the fundamentals of tithing. It was, like I said, strong-armed, but I'm thankful that he did it because if he wouldn't have done it, I wouldn't have got the revelation of it. I was a tipper. I was a tipper. I'd give God a little bit here and there, and you give him what you could or whatever, whenever it was convenient. But as we grew and God started speaking to Diana, she got her education, her master's degree, and did all that through her schooling and pushing as hard as we did. But then the Lord gave us an idea outside of what we naturally would have thought. It was Diana that had the revelation. It's amazing how many times the Lord has used her to help our family. Husbands, listen to your wives. They have wisdom, and wives, listen to your husbands. But I'm just saying don't always just think that you have it all and that you know God, well, I'm the head of the house and you better listen to me. I thank God that she had the idea for eBay and Poshmark. Thank God it came from a Holy Ghost-inspired idea of desperation. Couldn't pay our electric bill. But I'm saying as we tithed and we gave, we kept tithing and we keep giving, and it's become foundation in our life where God is always first. That was where I was going with that. By keeping God first in your marriage, praying together, reading the Bible together, reading little books like this together, we keep our marriage fresh that way. And I don't always say there haven't been hard days; we go through it. But we know if we pray together, we stay together, and we take communion together, and we know that if we seek him together, we'll find him. I've learned to lean on her discernment a lot. I believe there's a lot of discernment in women. God has gifted women with great discernment. Don't you agree? They're like, it's like Billy Burke says, they're the rear guard of the household. They're able to see things a lot of times that the man doesn't see. And when she gets these emails and people are always saying they've got something going on and Diana says, I have to check. I have to pray about that. Let's pray about that together more. And I say, You see something I don't see. Okay. Well, I trust it. And she says, I don't always trust the motive behind the individual. You have to pray. And we learn as you intercede and as you pray and you grow, God will develop you and you'll go from glory to glory. But I was praying over things today and the anointing and the presence of the Lord was so strong, and he was talking to me about what's about to happen. Going and praying into 2026, this is a year you can't just let your guard down. You must be spiritually alert. 2026 is going to be a high alert year. We must pray for our country concerning terrorist attacks, Red Dawn experiences. Oh, Brandon, you said—I'm telling you by the spirit of God, you must have your eyes open. Do not become dazed for the days that are ahead concerning this nation, concerning our president, his safety, and all the things that I keep telling you and talking to you all about. This is a time to have your senses heightened all around the world. You say, Well, I'm not in America. Well, if you live in Australia, if you live in Europe, if you have your spiritual discernment heightened by praying and fasting, by seeking him, you will find him. This is a time not for the church to be asleep. You must wake up. I'm telling you, closing out 2025 and really coming alive in 2026 even more. You need to have your eyes open. I have a great warning going into the future and praying over this year, praying over 2026, but I was seeing the old generals and he said, Go back to the wells, the wells of the revival. You see the picture behind us? That Thanksgiving picture was what I saw in the spirit when the Pilgrims came and they put their hands together and they made a covenant to God at Plymouth Rock. And I saw an actual rock that they stood around and they prayed and they took communion and they dedicated the land of America as one nation that they would have a God-fearing—they dedicated this land, this property where we are. We dedicate this land to Jesus that we will be a people that live by faith, that have a freedom of religion and all the things that they sought out for. The Lord said to me, he said, Brandon—he brought it up to me tonight, Brandon—those prayers still go before me. The prayers of your founding fathers clear back at Plymouth Rock. They go before me. George Washington's prayers on the battlefield when he was fighting the British, when he was fighting the battle and he was weary, and I gave him supernatural strength to fight for the land. When George Washington had bullets flying all around him, they said bullets were all in his cloak. His jacket, what he had on, all those bullets from—he had bullets all through his clothes because they were that close to hitting him. But the hand of the Lord was on him to protect him for this nation. And as he was praying, God, give me strength to finish this battle, God supernaturally gave him a strength, knowing that there was going to be a Diana and a Brandon standing here today praying for you in America saying Jesus is coming. Jesus is coming. Do you know our friend? We had over 100 people get saved this last video. That's what it's all about to us. 97, Braden said so far just on the livestream, and then how many people on emails and everything else, has been over the top from the other videos. But as I saw in the spirit George Washington fighting the battle and God gave him strength and he prayed that this nation would be a nation that feared God. Those prayers still go before the Father. He's not forgotten it. And he said to me, "You will not be a goat nation. You will be a sheep nation." And a great shaking to awaken is coming to this land. It will not be a land that turns its back and does things against me, becoming a goat nation from the Father. We will remain a sheep nation. I want to be a sheep; I don't want to be a goat. So I want to encourage you all today: America is not done for. America is not falling off. Well, we see Mamdani, or whatever his name is, up there in New York and all these things—yeah, there are some radical things happening right now. Braden had a list of all the churches in the last 24 months in Texas alone; 48 mosques were raised up in Texas in this area right here in the last 24 months. 48 mosques were created or raised up in Texas. Ladies and gentlemen, does anybody know this stuff is going on? As we see this stuff happen, a great shaking is coming. Go back to what he said: go back to the family units. Go back to the foundation. Go back to the basics, the ABCs. Don't get out of the ABCs. There are so many people that have forgotten the ABCs. What does that mean? The fundamentals of Christianity. It all ties together, what he's telling me and what I'm trying to tell y'all tonight. Don't forget kindergarten; don't forget it because you're going to use what you learned in first grade. It all goes from glory to glory. It's the same way with your faith and your walk with the Father. You learn your confession. You learn how to speak things and call those things that be not as though they were in Romans. You've got to learn that life and death is in the power of your tongue. The more you speak out of your mouth, what you're saying is what you're living. What you said yesterday is what you'll live tomorrow. What you're living today is what you said yesterday. You must understand that life and death is in the power of your tongue. Most people just say things flippantly. Even Pastor Chip and Candace say all the time, "What's the first thing that comes out of your mouth? What's your first response?" What's your first response to the circumstance when the doctor gives you a bad report? "Well, your blood pressure is too high. We're going to have to put you on blood thinners." They're going to do all this stuff because you get these bad reports, but what's the first thing? "Well, I guess I'm dying. My marriage is going to heck. My kids are going to hell. My finances aren't doing any good." You speak all those things out of your mouth, and the more you speak them, you'll have them. Most people go, "I don't believe that," but the devil knows the power of your tongue and its influence. Even when it comes to God, we are made in His image. As He is, so are we in this world. He spoke it, and it was. Remember what I told you: God's words do not return to Him void. They will accomplish that for which He sent them. When I went to the throne room and the Lord was speaking, none of His words died. They all became seeds before the throne. As they went together and all the letters came together, they formed sentences right before my face. They became a mustard seed in front of my face. All His words came out of Him and formed a mustard seed that started to grow because they didn't die. Everything the Lord says never returns to Him void. He does not speak to hear Himself talk; He speaks to make real things happen in a real world. That's what Oral Roberts even said: "Make no little plans here. Believe God for big." You've got to speak to your mountain. Your mountain needs to hear your voice because we're made in His image. So I'm trying to tell us as Christians to always speak life into the circumstances. If you get mad and say something stupid, repent and say, "I thank you, Lord, that there's a crop failure over those words. I don't want my words to bring that." There was a family, the Shooks, when I was a teenager; they had a church in Fort Worth and they would always say, "Is that what you want? You'll have what you say." They'd always be quick to correct you. I've always thought about that. You'll have what you say; life and death is in the power of your tongue. So I want you to really think about things when we talk about America. We want to speak life, peace, and joy. But these things I'm telling you are warnings. We need to pray and take our authority. I have to warn you. I told you 1 Corinthians 5:5; the Lord said an acceleration of 1 Corinthians 5:5 will be on the ones that are not awake because they're still asleep. A lot of the pastors behind the pulpits are preaching a lukewarm gospel. The Lord said they must start to tell my people what I told you about Oral Roberts and the great awakening, the last call. He had this visitation, and it was so strong that it shook him. He said, "This is me telling the people that the soon return of my son is at hand. They must start preaching fire behind the pulpits." The Lord told me 1 Corinthians 5:5 was going to start to be amplified. He said, "I've warned them through 2025 to get prepared and to start telling my people that I'm coming, and they have disobeyed me. For much is given, much is required." Brandon, much is given, much is required. I've given them celebrity and no lack of finances—some make millions of dollars every month—yet they've not listened to what I've told them to do by telling the people about Revelation, repentance, and seeking me. John the Baptist yelled. How many times did we hear the prophetic voices in the Old Testament warn that the Messiah was coming the first time? Isaiah yelled and yelled. People said, "Oh, hundreds of years passed by." The Bible says there will be scoffers. Peter said, "There'll be scoffers." "Well, when is the coming of the Lord? We've heard this before." But people will scoff. But I'm telling you, just as in the days of Noah, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. They mocked Noah over and over. 'Oh, it's going to rain. Oh, Noah. Oh, crazy Noah.' When I had that vision and saw the timeline, I told everybody, 'The Lord allowed me to see Noah.' I got to see Noah, and he had a big nose. He had a ginormous nose and his ears were ginormous. I thought, 'What in the world is that? Who is this?' As I was looking, the Lord said, 'That's Noah.' I could see him building the ark. I could see everything. The trees were massive and green; it was beautiful. The canopy above the earth was pink with beautiful colors, and it was actually humming. It had noise. I don't know why, but the atmosphere above the world... all the trees were huge. There was no death. The earth was gorgeous. It looked so pretty the way the plants were. Compared to what we have now—I don't want to say there was no death, there was death there—but the greenery wasn't like it is now. Our trees are nothing compared to what I saw when I was there in the spirit. It's the same thing when I told you Adam was talking to a dinosaur-looking thing. I saw Adam and he was ripped; he had muscles. He was talking to what looked like a long-neck dinosaur. I thought this was amazing, but the Lord showed me the timeframe. He went through each thousand years and played it before my eyes like a movie screen. I could see it all playing before me. Everything was so beautiful; I described it the best I could. I could see them building the Colosseum, the pyramids, and even the Great Wall of China. It all played before me: battles, kingdoms, empires rising and falling. It was all planned. I could see the city of Atlantis; it was destroyed. I saw it all happen. Everything was played before my eyes. The Lord allowed me to see this, but He said, 'I'm allowing you to see where you are right now. You're right here. And this little sliver of time is all you have left.' This dispensation of grace, where we are at this time after Jesus came for us—you're right here and you're about to come over into the thousand years. But there's a seven-year tribulation that's about to begin, and then a thousand-year reign where you'll be with Me. I got to see the thousand years and it looked like Eden coming with the new heaven and the new earth and all the things that were about to be happening in the future. We were translated, all of us, and we all had beautiful robes on. We were in one place one minute and another place the next. I could see the Garden of Eden was reestablished. Everything was green and the canopy was back. The colors and the sound were back; I could hear it. But I'm trying to tell you that we're almost there. This dispensation of grace is coming to an end and the tribulation is about to begin. Jesus Christ is coming, ladies and gentlemen. You may think, 'I've heard that and heard that,' but I bring this to you again tonight to warn you. You must repent of your sins and come to know my friend Jesus Christ. If you don't know Him, you're in trouble. There's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. All of humanity has come to the wire. We're right here. As we see the days get darker and darker with artificial babies and manipulation—as in the days of Noah, the Nephilim, all the angels lying with the women and creating superhuman giants and weird stuff—we see them trying to do things just like it with AI technology. We see the Prince of Saudi Arabia, who I believe is the Antichrist, comes to the White House to talk to President Trump. I thought, 'Look, MBS is coming.' Well, I don't care what you believe. Some believe it's in Europe, but you just keep watching MBS. You keep watching the Mahdi. That's who I believe it is. Some people think it's the Syrian king, the Assyrian guy. I don't. I believe we're seeing it all play in front of our faces. The end of the end is playing out right in front of us. I believe we're about to see Israel take a different turn like you wouldn't believe, going into Ezekiel 38 and 39. All these things are about to take place. Keep watching for an escalation of things. The Lord told us even about 2026. As I keep praying into 2026, I believe He said you'll have to contend. I told you there will be one percent of the Body of Christ—if you're listening to me—for many of the people who call me 'Lord, Lord' don't know Me. Their hearts are so far from Me. For wide is the gate, and broad is the way that leadeth to destruction, and many there be which go in thereat. Because Strait is the gate, and narrow is the way which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it. Narrow means real thin. I just want to make sure that you don't just think you qualify because you said all this, but you don't live right. I'm not sold out for Jesus. I'm like the virgins; my lamp is not full of oil. Christianity shouldn't just be when it's convenient. God is not a convenience; He's a lifestyle. He is everything. I want to be sold out for Jesus, so that if a gun were put to your head, you would say, 'I don't deny Christ.' I've seen those days coming. The very freedoms that we take for granted will be challenged in the days ahead. I saw the tribulation. Do I believe we go through the tribulation as the Body of Christ? No, I do not. I believe that God is not a wife-beater. I believe with all my heart that we escape the wrath to come. I don't believe that I'm appointed unto wrath. I'm a joint heir with Jesus Christ. We're going to wreak havoc on the Antichrist and his agenda. How can he run ragged and do all the things that he wants to do with people like us in here saying, "Hey, we're not going to stand for that. We got authority over you, devil." He's going to be going, "We got to get these Christians out here. They're going to be excited." Especially the ones that are radical like us. He's going to be like, "Thank God Brandon and Diana and his family are gone. They're in the rapture," because it's like I told you. You want to be that Christian that every day you wake up, the devil goes, "Oh, God, they're awake." You know, they're awake again. We got to get ready, guys. They're going to come and try to slap us in the head or lead more people to Jesus. But most people live so lukewarm that they don't even realize the times we're living in. They really don't care. They're more interested in drinking their beer and going to their football game than they are having a Holy Ghost party. Well, you know what's convenient? We're going to go out and socialize tonight and have some liquor and have a little fun because I just had a stressful week. You know, let's go out and maybe go to the club and watch some girls take their clothes off. I don't know, something crazy. But most people, because I had people in the church tell me, "Oh, it's okay, brother. You know, it's okay to go to the strip clubs every once in a while." I said, "Are you out of your mind?" "Well, that's where I met my girlfriend." Well, that's a dandy of a relationship, isn't it? That one's built to last. You met your girlfriend, that's going to be your wife, at a strip club and you go to church together and go to the strip club because that's how y'all get excited. That is sickening. But people think that's okay. It's not okay. It's not okay to live in sin. Most preachers don't want to tell you that. "Well, you know, we don't want to scare them off because they're numbers in our pew. And if we can keep them coming, maybe they'll change." But we don't want to tell them the truth while we're here because just maybe they'll keep coming to tell them if you're homosexual, you're going to hell. We can't tell you the truth because we don't want to judge them. No, we got to tell you what's right and what's wrong. And the Bible says, "He that lies with another man and those that lie with another woman are going to hell." That's what the Bible says. But people get all upset about it and go, "Well, Brandon, I'm turning you off." I am responsible to tell you the truth. I'm responsible to tell you if you worship Muhammad, you're going to hell. If you worship Buddha, you're going to hell. That's what the Bible says. There is no one that comes to the Father unless it's through Jesus Christ. You must come to Jesus Christ and through him you will be saved. But you must hear the truth from a preacher for me to tell you you cannot enter into the kingdom of God living in sin. You must repent and turn from your wicked ways. But most people don't want to hear that. False religions, false idols, false gods. You cannot enter into the kingdom of God. You must know Jesus Christ. And the Bible says, "Turn from your sins. Don't keep doing it." "Oh, Brandon, you're just old-fashioned. You just make me mad as you know what." Somebody's got to tell you the truth, and I only tell you out of love. If I didn't care, I wouldn't come on here. I have more things I can do with my time at night. But the Lord said, "Go on there and tell them, Brandon, I need you to warn them because they're not hearing it from church. They say it's okay." We had one guy that wanted to get a sex change. He wanted the church to pay for the sex change, but he got mad when we told him he couldn't go into the girls' bathroom and start using the girls' bathroom in our church. So, he wanted to sue the church. That's where we were. That happened in our church where we were. And he said, "Well, I'm going to sue you all because I can't go into your girls' bathroom and go in there with them because I relate with myself as a female." And I said, "I dare you to go in there with my little girl. Seriously." But people go, "Well, we got to love them where they are." No, we got to tell them you're wrong. We got to tell them they're going to hell if they keep that behavior up. You got to repent and turn from it. That is love. But most people don't want to hear it. "Well, you're hateful." That's not hateful. It's the truth. You were born with what parts you have. That's who you are. Check your parts. If you were born with a penis, you're a man. If you were born with a vagina, you are a woman. That's what you are. There's no confusion in it. It's called a demon and you need to go get deliverance and a devil's on your mind.
